title: The quality of accessories
bodyHtml:
All products sold on our sites must be delivered with compatible accessories:

Smartphones: 

  • Wall plug charger is no longer mandatory, only the charger cable is mandatory
  • Headphones are no longer mandatory since 19. December 2020)

Tablets/Macbooks/PCs: Charger
iMac: Keyboard and Mouse

If an accessory is not supplied or is not compatible, you must offer the customer a commercial gesture (see table below) or send him the missing accessory. If the accessory is not compatible, you can provide a return voucher to retrieve it before refunding / returning a new accessory.

Charger and charging dock

Apple

Below is a list of basic checks to know to ensure the quality of the original Apple charger and charging dock. 

You should always check:

  • OS compatibility (depending on the age of the models, the type of charger may be different).
  • The marking on the dock located below the USB port (serial number)

  • Marking on charging cable (marking along the cable).
  • Respect for the original manufacturer's colors.
  • The "MFI" // "CE" // "RoHS" certification.
  • That the charger can operate in both directions.
  • The result of a technical test of the charger (voltage, amperage, watt, charging speed). Please select a viable sample. You can also refer to the "Charger and lightning testers" section of this guide. 
  • The Lightning to Apple USB cable is marked "Designed by Apple in California". As well as the mention on the cable, "Assembled in China", "Assembled in Vietnam" or "Indústria Brasileira" will be visible about 17 cm from the USB connector. A serial number with 12 digits follows this mention.

Test on chargers and lightning

You can test OS compatibility by manually connecting the device to the charger. Your accessories will not be compatible if this message appears: "This accessory is not compatible with the device".

It is also advisable to use a Lightning cable tester to test a significant sample when in doubt about the originality or quality of the products offered to sellers.

If the cable is original, the display will show "original, as well as the code engraved on the cable". If the cable is not original, the display will show "copycat". 

The "score" number corresponds to the quality of the cable, 100 corresponding to an original cable.

In the case of a generic, the closer the number is to 100, the better the quality of the cable.

 

Samsung / Android

Samsung chargers and charging docks and Android, in general, must comply with the manufacturers' recommendations in terms of voltage, amperage and watts. These characteristics vary according to the manufacturer.

The chargers specify the current intensity (in amperes) and voltage (in volts) at the output, for the smartphone. To easily calculate the charger's output power (in watts), simply multiply the current by the voltage.

For example, in the case of a conventional charger capable of delivering a current of 1 ampere on 5 volts, we will be allowed 5 watts at the output. 

 SUMMARY TABLE - MANUFACTURER RECOMMENDATIONS



Regarding the quality of the chargers offered to the end customer, we recommend that you use the original manufacturer accessories.  However, the price of the original accessories is sometimes very expensive, so you can use accessories certified by the manufacturer.
